title: Week of April 6, 2026
summary: This week focused on improving platform reliability for RevOps teams. OpsPal now automatically resolves missing component issues that could previously prevent the platform from starting properly, ensuring smoother access to your automation workflows.

entries.headline: Platform automatically fixes missing components during startup
details: OpsPal now detects and installs missing components when you start a session
You'll see clear error messages if any components can't be installed automatically
Manual fix instructions are provided when automatic repairs aren't possible
